criteria_verification.criterion_text: Tests mock `create_deep_agent` at the import site (`agents.player.create_deep_agent`)
criteria_verification.evidence: TestPatchAtImportSite class patches agents.player.create_deep_agent (not deepagents.create_deep_agent). test_create_deep_agent_patched_at_import_site verifies mock_cda.assert_called_once(). test_returns_result_of_create_deep_agent confirms return value identity.

criteria_verification.evidence: TestCallArgsKeywordArguments class uses _, kwargs = mock_cda.call_args pattern to verify all 5 kwargs: system_prompt, memory, tools (membership), backend (identity), and model (string type). Each is a separate test method for precise failure attribution.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Tests verify `FilesystemBackend` is in the `backend` kwarg
criteria_verification.evidence: TestFilesystemBackendWiring class uses the two-part assertion pattern: (1) mock_backend_cls.assert_called_once_with(root_dir='.') verifies constructor args, (2) kwargs['backend'] is fake_backend verifies the instance is forwarded to create_deep_agent.

criteria_verification.evidence: TestToolsListSize class verifies len(kwargs['tools']) == 2 and both tool_a and tool_b are present via membership assertions (in kwargs['tools']).
